testcase.name: test_catalog_category_delete_blocks_if_products

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 4xx got 404 assert 404 in (400, 409) + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vfast_phase2_admin.py:244: in test_catalog_category_delete_blocks_if_products assert r2.status_code in (400, 409), f"expected 4xx got {r2.status_code}" E AssertionError: expected 4xx got 404 E assert 404 in (400, 409) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_inventory_list_low_update_batches

failure.message: AssertionError: stock not incremented: {'id': '6eb2c57d-6358-459c-b324-f3b1ec224f39', 'name': 'Test Product', 'brand': 'TestBrand', 'image': '/static/test.png', 'price': 89, 'pack_size': '500ml', 'stock': 0, 'reorder_level': 5} assert ({'id': '6eb2c57d-6358-459c-b324-f3b1ec224f39', 'name': 'Test Product', 'brand': 'TestBrand', 'image': '/static/test.png', ...} is not None and 0 >= 25)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vfast_phase2_admin.py:280: in test_inventory_list_low_update_batches assert me is not None and me["stock"] >= 25, f"stock not incremented: {me}" E AssertionError: stock not incremented: {'id': '6eb2c57d-6358-459c-b324-f3b1ec224f39', 'name': 'Test Product', 'brand': 'TestBrand', 'image': '/static/test.png', 'price': 89, 'pack_size': '500ml', 'stock': 0, 'reorder_level': 5} E assert ({'id': '6eb2c57d-6358-459c-b324-f3b1ec224f39', 'name': 'Test Product', 'brand': 'TestBrand', 'image': '/static/test.png', ...} is not None and 0 >= 25)
